title: AwardsWatch - FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: PRODUCTION DESIGN
text: According to AwardsWatch's final predictions for the 98th Academy Awards on March 15, 2026, Frankenstein is the frontrunner in Production Design. Frankenstein (Netflix) leads with production design by Tamara Deverell and set decoration by Shane Vieau. The film has maintained this position throughout the awards season, securing major nominations across BAFTA, ADG, CCA, and SDSA. The remaining competitive slate includes Sinners (Warner Bros) with Hannah Beachler's production design, Hamnet (Focus Features) featuring Fiona Crombie's work, One Battle After Another (Warner Bros), and Marty Supreme (A24). The article notes that the Netflix adaptation represents another clean sweep, suggesting its dominance across multiple design-focused awards bodies has been consistent and commanding throughout the season.
